title: BrainCraft Knowledge Graph Concept Node
description: A single node in the static knowledge graph structure (docs/08-knowledge-graph/overview.md). This schema covers only structural, largely-static data — identity, prerequisites, mastery criteria, and links to teaching content. Per-learner state (mastery/confidence/retention scores) is deliberately NOT modeled here; per docs/12-database/overview.md that is high-write data that belongs in Postgres, keyed by (learner, nodeId), not duplicated into this static reference structure.

id.description: Namespaced concept identifier matching a lesson's knowledgeGraphNodeId, e.g. 'python.variables' or 'sklearn.demand-forecaster'.

prerequisites.description: IDs of concept nodes that must be at mastery threshold before this node is offered. Must never form a cycle across the full graph (checked by scripts/generate_knowledge_graph.py, not enforced by this schema alone since cycle-freedom is a whole-graph property, not a per-node one).

minAssessmentScore.description: Minimum score (0-1) on the lesson's primary assessment required to count this node as mastered — mastery learning per docs/01-learning-science/overview.md, not a fixed time-in-lesson.

requiresTeachBack.description: Whether the lesson's teach-back step must be completed satisfactorily for mastery, not just the graded assessment.

requiresLabPass.description: Whether the associated lab's automated tests must pass for mastery.

lessonId.description: The id of the lesson (from schemas/lesson.schema.json) that teaches this node. One-to-one in the current curriculum; the field is singular because no node currently spans multiple lessons, not because the model forbids it — a future many-lessons-per-node case would need this promoted to an array.

isBossBattle.description: Mirrors the source lesson's isBossBattle flag.

capstoneContribution.description: Mirrors the source lesson's capstoneContribution field, denormalized here so the graph is browsable without joining back to the lesson file.
